title: hieracium gnaphalium
intro: Hieracium gnaphalium, also known as hawkweed, is a perennial herb with yellow flowers and a bitter taste, belonging to the dandelion family. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects, making it useful in treating skin conditions, wounds, and urinary issues. The health benefits of Hieracium gnaphalium include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatic pain, and acting as a natural remedy for digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Hieracium gnaphalium are often made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
